items.title: Iran's supreme leader absent as senior officials attend ayatollah's funeral
items.summary: Mojtaba Khamenei has not been seen in public since the attack which killed his father at the onset of the US-Israel war with Iran.

items.title: US marks 250th birthday with fireworks, flyovers and extreme weather
items.summary: US President Donald Trump's speech included some of his political agenda but also honoured war veterans and American history.

items.title: Evacuations in Guam as super typhoon Bavi approaches
items.summary: The storm is forecast to bring winds in excess of 160mph and waves nearly 11m high when it makes landfall on Monday.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 澳洲前內政部次長警示台海局勢：台灣將是我們的波蘭，須做好開戰準備
items.summary: 澳洲前內政部常務次長裴佐洛（Mike Pezzullo）指出，太平洋地區在2027至2029年間，有可能爆發戰爭，「台灣將會是我們的波蘭」，如果澳洲的主要盟友美國參戰，澳洲就...…

items.title: 澳洲在太平洋推體育外交 藉橄欖球阻中國擴張影響力
items.summary: 澳洲總理艾班尼斯為了遏止中國擴張勢力，發動體育外交攻勢。官員今天表示，3位太平洋島國領袖將前往澳洲舉行安全會談，時間就安排在一場備受矚目的橄欖球比賽當天。  法新社報導，巴布亞紐幾內亞總...…

items.title: 美250週年國慶川普開講 15萬人頂雷雨力挺
items.summary: 美國總統川普週六（4日）晚間出席美國建國250週年慶典，並在華盛頓國家廣場對超過15萬名冒著暴風雨留守的民眾發表國慶演說。川普在演講中強烈譴責共產主義是「失敗者」與「癌症」，誓言...…
